title: After Real Madrid's UCL comeback falls short, can their project be salvaged?
summary: Real Madrid suffered elimination from the Champions League after losing to Bayern Munich in a dramatic quarter-final, raising questions about the viability of their project moving forward.
content: Big questions lie ahead for Real Madrid following their defeat to Bayern Munich in an instant Champions League classic.

zh.title: 皇马欧冠梦碎，他们的项目还能被拯救吗？
zh.summary: 皇马在欧冠四分之一决赛中不敌拜仁慕尼黑遭淘汰，这引发了人们对皇马前景是否可行的质疑。

title: While other giants fire, Arteta's Arsenal continues to flicker in the background
summary: Arsenal advanced to the Champions League semi-finals with a 0-0 draw against Sporting, but their inconsistent performances throughout the season have left their future prospects uncertain.
content: Arsenal eked out a 0-0 draw against Sporting on Wednesday, which was enough to carry them through to the UCL semis, but their season very much remains in the balance.

zh.title: 当其他豪门火力全开时，阿尔特塔的阿森纳在背后暗淡
zh.summary: 阿森纳与葡萄牙体育队0-0战平，晋级欧冠半决赛，但整个赛季表现不一致，未来前景堪忧。

title: Arteta tells Arsenal fans to enjoy, not criticize
summary: After reaching the Champions League semi-finals, Mikel Arteta urged Arsenal fans to appreciate their achievement rather than focus on ongoing criticism of the team's form.
content: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal fans to "enjoy where we are" after reaching the Champions League semifinals amid criticism of their performances.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔敦促阿森纳球迷欣赏而非批评
zh.summary: 在晋级欧冠半决赛后，米克尔·阿尔特塔敦促阿森纳球迷欣赏球队的成就，而不是关注对球队表现的持续批评。

title: Beckham: Miami won't rush head coach search
summary: Inter Miami co-owner David Beckham indicated the club will take its time finding the right replacement for departing head coach Javier Mascherano.
content: Inter Miami co-owner David Beckham said his team will be patient in the search for a new coach following the departure of Javier Mascherano.

zh.title: 贝克汉姆：迈阿密不会仓促寻找主教练
zh.summary: Inter Miami共同所有人大卫·贝克汉姆表示，俱乐部将花时间为即将离任的主教练哈维尔·马斯切拉诺寻找合适的替代者。

title: 'Joke': Madrid fume at costly red card in UCL exit
summary: Real Madrid's coaching staff and players criticized Eduardo Camavinga's red card as the decisive factor in their Champions League quarter-final elimination by Bayern Munich.
content: Coach Álvaro Arbeloa said it was "obvious" that Eduardo Camavinga's red card was crucial in Real Madrid's Champions League quarterfinal elimination by Bayern Munich on Wednesday, while midfielder Jude Bellingham called the decision "a joke."

zh.title: "荒唐"：皇马对欧冠出局的昂贵红牌感到愤怒
zh.summary: 皇家马德里的教练组和球员批评埃杜阿尔多·卡马温加的红牌是他们在欧冠四分之一决赛中被拜仁慕尼黑淘汰的决定性因素。

title: Bayern oust Madrid in UCL classic; PSG up next
summary: Bayern Munich completed a stunning Champions League quarter-final comeback with a 4-3 victory over Real Madrid, eliminating the competition's record 15-time champions and advancing to face PSG in the semi-finals.
content: Bayern Munich scored two late goals to knock record 15-time European champions Real Madrid out of the Champions League following a thrilling 4-3 win at the Allianz Arena on Wednesday.

zh.title: 拜仁在欧冠大战中淘汰皇马；PSG即将登场
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑以4-3击败皇家马德里，完成了欧冠四分之一决赛的惊人逆转，淘汰了这项赛事的纪录保持者15次冠军，并晋级半决赛对阵PSG。

title: FIFA prez: Iran 'for sure' will play at World Cup
summary: FIFA President Gianni Infantino confirmed Iran will participate in this summer's World Cup despite ongoing geopolitical tensions with the United States.
content: FIFA president Gianni Infantino said Wednesday that Iran would "for sure" be at the World Cup this summer, despite the ongoing war with the United States.

zh.title: FIFA主席：伊朗"肯定会"参加世界杯
zh.summary: 国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺证实，尽管与美国存在持续的地缘政治紧张关系，伊朗将参加今年夏天的世界杯。

title: Messi hit with $7M lawsuit over missed friendly
summary: A Miami-based event promoter has filed a $7 million lawsuit against Lionel Messi and the Argentine Football Association, claiming fraud and breach of contract over a missed exhibition match.
content: A Miami-based event promoter has filed a $7 million lawsuit against Lionel Messi and the Argentine Football Association, alleging fraud and breach of contract after the star sat out an exhibition match last October.

zh.title: 梅西因错过友谊赛遭起诉700万美元
zh.summary: 一名迈阿密的活动推广人对莱昂内尔·梅西和阿根廷足球协会提起700万美元诉讼，声称他们因取消表演赛而存在欺诈和违约行为。

title: Arteta wanted fire but Arsenal limp to semis - does style matter?
summary: Arsenal delivered a lackluster performance but secured the necessary result to advance to the Champions League semi-finals, prompting questions about whether style matters in knockout competitions.
content: Mikel Arteta wanted "fire" from his Arsenal players but instead got a sluggish performance as the Gunners did what was needed to reach the Champions League semi-finals.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔期待火热但阿森纳艰难晋级半决赛——风格重要吗？
zh.summary: 阿森纳表现不佳但确保了晋级欧冠半决赛所需的比赛结果，这引发了关于风格在淘汰赛中是否重要的问题。
